opportunities.title: Alberta Innovates AI/ML Services Roster
opportunities.description: Pre-qualified vendor roster for AI, machine learning and automation services. RFP MW0202 (AB‑2026‑00962) seeks up to 3 vendors for AI/ML solutions, generative AI, agent-based AI, business process automation, data engineering, and responsible AI enablement.

opportunities.title: Titan Technology Corp - HVAC AI Partnership
opportunities.description: Strategic BD opportunity with regional HVAC distributor seeking AI-powered predictive maintenance solution for commercial buildings

opportunities.title: Natural Gas Producer - Compute Facility Proposal
opportunities.description: Major Alberta natural gas producer exploring co-location of AI compute facility at existing processing plant with stranded power
